column8: I think Mohammed Ali was the__________(great) boxer that ever lived.
column9: It was the_________(boring) film I had ever seen.
column10: Our teacher told us that the student with the___________(high) mark would get a prize.
column11: Ginger is on of the________(lucky) cats alive - he's been hit by the car three times and has never been hurt!
column12: Out of all the students in my music school, I practise_____________(often).
column13: The Pacific is the___________(deep) ocean in the world.
column14: That's the__________(ugly) fish I've ever seen!
column15: I was ill before the exam and I did__________(badly) out of the whole class.
column16: The__________(far) I've run in one day is about ten kilometres.
column17: Don't you think this would be the_________(lovely) spot for picnic?
column18: But that's the_________(crazy) idea I've ever heard!
column19: I asked the assistant to show me the_________(modern) phone they had.
column20: I told the manager that it was the__________(bad) hotel I had ever stayed in.
column21: Who do you think is the___________(little) talented actor to win an Oscar?
column22: Out of all the members of the choir, Jason sang_____________(well).
